title: sorbus domestica var. pyrifera
intro: Sorbus domestica var. pyrifera, also known as the Chinese rowan or Chinese mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Asia, characterized by its clusters of white or pinkish flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The berries of Sorbus domestica var. pyrifera have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
